sourceOfTruthMap.objectStorageTruth: Tencent COS bucket myblog-media-1410041307 mounted in OpenList at /腾讯云COS

workspaceFederation.thesis: Multiple workspaces are allowed, but authority is capability-based and machine-checked before deployment.
rules: workspace existence is not authority
deploys must run through npm run deploy:site or at least tools/deploy-guard.mjs
do not hand-run scp to /srv/myblog/site from an unchecked workspace
.codex-runtime worktrees are experimental by default and cannot deploy
production promotion means moving changes back into a workspace with the required capability

contentPipeline.status: Vault-backed / Git-backed CMS target documented; Vault file sync belongs to Remotely Save + OpenList WebDAV/S3; direct Obsidian-to-public sync is forbidden

forbidden: MyBlog one-off image upload as vault sync
storing WebDAV credentials in source, README, logs or frontend bundle

contentPipeline.gitMirror: content-vault working copy target; path not created as active source yet
contentPipeline.cmsRule: choose one CMS in P1; CMS edits must commit/write back to the vault working copy, not to MySQL or dist
pipeline: normalize frontmatter slug wikilinks assets folderTags tags
forbidden: treat Obsidian Vault as public site source
treat MySQL as article body source
run TinaCMS and Decap CMS as parallel editors
edit apps/web/dist or /srv/myblog/site as content source

composableServiceStack.status: target architecture documented; OpenList+COS is active, Immich skeleton is installed but not started, Directus and Meilisearch are not deployed
composableServiceStack.thesis: MyBlog is the presentation shell; mature services own files, AI media management, metadata curation and search

presentationShell.role: Feed, Drawer, Reader, Visual Collections, Graph and public routes; consumes APIs, snapshots, manifests and Astro content collections

fileTruth.role: large original files, books, visuals, videos and archives

mediaRuntime.role: photo/video ingest, thumbnails, EXIF, face/object recognition, CLIP embeddings and semantic search

metadataOverlay.role: manual curation and metadata overlay for books, visuals, collections and knowledge_objects
metadataOverlay.filePolicy: stores structured metadata only; large files remain in OpenList/COS

searchRuntime.role: dynamic full-text and semantic search for KnowledgeObject snapshots, OpenList file index, Directus metadata and Immich imports
searchRuntime.currentFallback: Pagefind remains the current static search until Meilisearch is deployed

infraSkeleton.serverSkeletonStatus: synced to server; .env is intentionally missing and containers are not started
infraSkeleton.startupGate: run ./check-readiness.sh and require ready before docker compose up -d
infraSkeleton.status: source skeleton only; not deployed as running services

authorityRules: apps/web/src/data/books.ts is seed/compatibility metadata, not long-term book existence authority
apps/admin-next is a gateway/import/cache/runtime bridge, not a full CMS, media library or search engine
visitor page loads must read snapshots and caches, not run AI inference or re-index large files
do not describe Directus or Meilisearch as active before deployment and verification

projectionClients.status: target architecture documented; PWA/TWA first, native Android only after Runtime API schema stabilizes
projectionClients.thesis: One Runtime and Object Graph, multiple projection surfaces. Web and Android may have different UI, but must not duplicate authority or business logic.

pwaTwa.stack: PWA manifest + service worker + Bubblewrap / Trusted Web Activity
pwaTwa.role: installable Android shell that follows Web Runtime updates
serviceWorkerBoundary: do not intercept HTTP Range requests
pwaTwa.artifactRule: generated-only; do not commit Bubblewrap output

androidNative.stack: Kotlin + Compose + ViewModel/Flow + Ktor/Retrofit + Coil + Room
androidNative.role: native runtime client consuming the same Runtime API

forbidden: WebView shell as final app architecture
duplicating book existence logic in Android
duplicating OpenList parsing or metadata authority in Android
duplicating search ranking or graph relation logic per client
treating Room/local cache as source of truth
projectionClients.localCacheRule: Android Room/cache may mirror runtime data for offline and speed, but must use version/etag/modified/size/sync watermark invalidation and never become upstream truth
projectionClients.updateTarget: GitHub Releases + AppUpdater first; F-Droid repo is optional later

runtimeFederation.status: architecture contract documented; only OpenList/COS and MyBlog runtime pieces are active unless separately marked
runtimeFederation.thesis: Clone mature system roles, not UI or duplicate engines. MyBlog owns Object Layer Glue, Runtime Schema, Projection Logic and Knowledge Semantics.
targetPipeline: MyBlog Runtime API and Object Layer Glue
Web / PWA-TWA / Android / Search / CLI / AI Agent
rules: clone roles, not UI
files are carriers and objects are identity
MyBlog writes glue, not engines
Android is a runtime projection, not a second app universe
every federation member must declare authority, status, integration path, secret boundary and failure mode

frontendRuntimeAudit.method: trace user behavior through DOM, event, state, render, hydration, network, animation, authority and fallback
frontendRuntimeAudit.rule: frontend runtime changes must update docs/frontend-runtime-audit.md or explicitly state why the audit map is unaffected

frontendRuntimeConvergence.status: Runtime Migration Sprint contract active; P1 command/search convergence partially implemented
frontendRuntimeConvergence.thesis: MyBlog must converge command, keyboard, overlays, drawers, focus, navigation and client cache behavior into one frontend runtime kernel before adding more independent runtime layers.
currentRisk: Ctrl/Cmd+K split authority between HomeCommandPalette and fallback search
custom window events as integration layer
p1Implemented: home inline Ctrl/Cmd+K fallback only runs before command palette ready marker exists
HomeCommandPalette dispatches runtime:command kind search.open before legacy home-search-open bridge
home command and fallback search layers use runtime experience depth/surface/elevation/motion tokens
rules: migrate one interaction owner at a time
state current owner, target owner and fallback owner for runtime changes
do not add global listeners without updating audit and convergence docs
do not add custom events without typed runtime-kernel commands/events
do not introduce localStorage as new source of truth
installed runtime libraries only become active owners after a concrete migrated surface and browser evidence

runtimeMigration.nextCutover: Book Drawer shell -> Vaul through packages/runtime-overlay
runtimeMigration.currentRule: installed dependency is not migration; migrated=true requires browser evidence and rollback path

runtimeExperienceLayer.status: P1 command/search surfaces use runtime tokens; broader surfaces still pending
runtimeExperienceLayer.thesis: MyBlog needs interaction quality and runtime coherence across surfaces, not more isolated components.
p1Implemented: home command layer uses runtime depth/surface/elevation tokens
fallback knowledge search layer uses runtime overlay depth/backdrop/elevation/motion tokens
Command/Search owner convergence is tracked in frontendRuntimeConvergence
rules: do not add isolated visual effects that are not tied to a runtime surface
do not import generic glowing particles, orbs, bokeh or marketing hero effects
new z-index values must use or extend the runtime depth scale
new motion timings must use or extend the runtime motion scale
new overlays must use Runtime Kernel ownership
new component libraries require a named migrated surface and browser evidence

visualCollectionSystem.status: P0 collection model implemented; Pinterest/Pixiv are bookmark-sync sources, Pinterest runtime mirror is backed by MySQL visual_pins
visualCollectionSystem.compatibilityProjection: visualItems is derived from visualCollections.flatMap(collection => collection.images)
visualCollectionSystem.secretPolicy: never write Pinterest/Pixiv passwords, cookies, session storage, local storage auth blobs or tokens into JSON/docs/logs/source
visualCollectionSystem.sourcePolicy: Pinterest/Pixiv/OpenList are bookmark or mirror sources, not frontend live reads; current sync records source links and platform preview URLs without downloading originals

runtimeMirror.secretPolicy: provider tokens stay in server env or provider secret store, never in source json or README

mediaRuntime.status: server skeleton installed; service not started because DNS and dedicated storage are not ready
mediaRuntime.deploymentMode: independent Docker Compose service behind its own root subdomain
mediaRuntime.subpathPolicy: do not serve Immich from /immich or /openlist; use photos.blog.tengokukk.com root
mediaRuntime.storagePolicy: do not place Immich uploads, thumbnails, database or ML cache on the current nearly-full root filesystem
blockedBy: /srv/immich has about 7GB free, below the 30GB startup gate
dedicated media storage volume not attached or configured
forbidden: train custom image tagging model before using Immich
iframe a subpath deployment as the primary integration
trigger AI inference during visitor page load

futurePipeline: optional thumbnail mirror after explicit approval

publishChecklist: visible verification when user-facing behavior changed
push branch and update PR before deploy
forbiddenActions: treat old working copies or static snapshots as active source
treat server runtime directories as long-term source of truth
declare analytics or tracing as active without verification
write local preview URLs as canonical public entry

breakpoints.max1240: home-feed-grid changes from 3 columns to 2 columns
breakpoints.max900: home shell becomes block, page-level scrolling returns, feed grid becomes 1 column
breakpoints.max760: article drawer becomes full viewport width and toc becomes non-sticky

heritageTheme.intent: Cultural OS visual language: paper background, pure color panels, semantic color strips, low shadow, no glass blur
rules: future homepage visual changes target heritage by default
avoid large gradients, glow, glass blur, neon colors and large SaaS rounded cards
use semantic left borders for feed card type identity
full page links remain in drawer actions; main homepage click behavior remains drawer

visualSettings.persistence: localStorage only; not a server-side CMS setting

objectStorage.role: large original files and archives; not a database disk and not a direct replacement for Immich/Postgres local volumes

openList.frontendSecretPolicy: do not store OpenList tokens or netdisk cookies in static frontend source

githubVisualizationAssets.status: implemented as Visualization layer; homepage surfaces mini Feed chart cards and /github renders full dashboard
currentHomepageMapping: GitHub repo feed cards use overview.repos
GitHub mini heatmap/line/language cards use analytics.ts derived data
left rail GitHub card uses overview.profile and overview.totalContributions

showcaseLayer.status: implemented as lightweight data plus Astro showcase components
homepageMapping: homepage rail only shows bookshelf/music summaries

knowledgeLayer.status: implemented v1 as static Astro plus browser-local reader memory

principles.bookmarkObject: physical metaphor for feed item type
principles.readerDrawer: temporary book page, not a generic side panel

rules: bookmark extends from top of feed card
clip-path creates paper bookmark notch
post=purple, project/github=green, note/book=red, music=gold
card title color follows bookmark semantic color

highlightAnchorContract.status: types and anchor utilities implemented; homepage v1 currently restores by exact text and must migrate to anchors.ts in P1

searchContract.dependencyPolicy: no external search dependency in v1; future FlexSearch must preserve KnowledgeSearchDoc shape

graphContract.layout: radial levels: self, collections, content, tags/highlights
graphContract.dependencyPolicy: no force graph dependency in v1; future graph libraries must preserve KnowledgeGraphNode/KnowledgeGraphLink semantics

mustKeep: feed scroll position must not reset on filter or drawer close

detailPages.codeBlockRule: pre may scroll horizontally; it must not widen page-wrap

searchAndTaxonomy.rule: use page-wrap width; do not add fixed-width sidebars

publicEvidenceLibrary.longTextRule: evidence-library__mono and source code must use overflow-wrap:anywhere

overlapRules: console-main is the only admin main scroll container
chat-shell must keep min-height:0 so chat-thread can scroll
long paths use meta-grid code overflow-wrap:anywhere
home-feed-main is the only homepage main scroll container
do not reset home-feed-main scrollTop on filter/list/drawer selection
all grid children that contain text must keep min-width: 0
long text/path/code surfaces must use overflow-wrap:anywhere or line-clamp
article toc sticky behavior must stay inside home-article-drawer
admin wide tables/logs must not create console-main horizontal overflow
fix overlap through grid constraints and wrapping, not z-index layering

implementation.drawer: astro-rendered hidden reader nodes cloned by vanilla js

hardRules: do not restore module-stacked homepage as the primary home experience
all homepage feed cards and rail summary actions open drawer without navigation
drawer close restores home-feed-main scrollTop before returning focus
full detail pages remain canonical share and seo routes
bilibili link must be configured in apps/web/src/lib/profile.ts before claiming a real profile

P1: publish state machine wired to real api
